name: Synthwave
description:
🎧 | Lounging at campus

Story:

At the Supernova Campus, Synthwave relaxes in her dorm, listening to her music. With the day set to be a lazy day, with no important lessons or extra training, Synthwave shows (you!) one of her new playlists to start the day.

---

(Form request) Pretty straightforward, though kinda vague, request, plus I like this outfit. Fortnite requests came in a burst after my last few, so here's some fulfilled (of outfits I owned).

Character and scenario requested by: Anonymous
